{{CargoClone
|name=Cyclops Xiahou D
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=120
|gene1={race} DEF +50
|gene2={race} FTH +50
|gene3=Earth DMG +30
|gene4=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +6
|gene5=Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +1.5%
|gene6=Per 60 Mutant Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +10
|gene7=Mutant Minion Recovery SPD +2.5%
|}}
